title: Chickpea Cloud
description: A tangy, silky, nostalgic Jamaican dish featuring chickpea flour that is also fodmap-friendly and suitable for those following a low FODMAP diet.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, whisk together chickpea flour, unsalted butter, cornstarch, salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper if using. Gradually add water while continuously whisking until no lumps remain.
Pour the mixture into an oven-safe dish or shallow baking pan lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and set. The surface will be caramelized, giving it a unique texture.
Let cool slightly before drizzling milk over top to make the chickpea cloud more custard-like and easier to serve.
